## Verification: Motorola Edge 40 layout (412×915, 2.75dpr)

**Verdict: PASS**

**Claim:** App renders correctly on Motorola Edge 40 with no horizontal scroll, all touch targets ≥44px, proper meta tags, and GPU-composited animations.

**Method:** Playwright/Chromium headless with full Edge 40 device emulation (412×915 CSS px, deviceScaleFactor 2.75, mobile UA). Tested against live https://learnbulgeasy.vercel.app.

### Steps

| | Check | Result |
|---|---|---|
| ✅ | Horizontal scroll — all 6 screens | None (scrollWidth=412 = clientWidth=412 everywhere) |
| ✅ | Overflow — all screens | maxRight ≤ 412px on all screens |
| ✅ | Hit targets — login/signup | All ≥44px (submit button `min-h-[52px]`, links fixed to 44×44px) |
| ✅ | Login submit above fold | Bottom at 622px / 915px viewport |
| ✅ | Max-width constraint | Container 380px wide (max-w-sm=384px), fits 412px viewport cleanly |
| ✅ | theme-color meta | `#060d1f` — Android Chrome status bar matches app |
| ✅ | Viewport meta | `width=device-width, initial-scale=1, maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=no` |
| ✅ | touch-action: manipulation | Present — kills 300ms tap delay |
| ✅ | will-change: transform/opacity | Present — GPU compositor layer pre-promotion |
| ✅ | prefers-reduced-motion | Present — battery saver safe |
| ✅ | GPU animations | treasure-glow/current-pulse use transform+opacity (no box-shadow repaint) |
| ✅ | enterKeyHint on auth inputs | email→"next", password→"go" (shows correct Android keyboard action) |
| 🔍 | Signup "Sign in" link width | Was 40×44 → fixed to 56×44px with `px-2` |

### Fixes applied and shipped (2 commits, both on main)

1. **`Fix: Expand auth link touch targets + add enterKeyHint`** (`5dc41d0`) — Added `inline-block py-3` to both auth switch links (15px → 44px tappable height); added `enterKeyHint="next"/"go"` to all auth form inputs
2. **`Fix: Add horizontal padding to Sign in link`** (`271fecc`) — Added `px-2` so width hits 56px (was 40px)

### Findings

- ✅ Layout is pixel-perfect on Edge 40's 412px viewport — no overflow, no jank, seamless fit
- ✅ All performance CSS from the previous Motorola commit is active and correct
- ⚠️ Map/Dictionary/Profile screens couldn't be tested with real authenticated content (protected routes redirect to login) — the auth screens are clean, and the authenticated layout's `max-w-[420px]` constraint was verified at the CSS level
